objective: Curate grove-core's public API (root re-exports + docs.rs-quality doc comments) and prove it from outside the workspace via a standalone, reproducible library smoke crate.
key_changes: Expand core/src/lib.rs //! crate doc and add curated pub use re-exports: Symbol, Defect, CallSite, MapEntry, FileMap, SourceResult, provision_project.
Keep all six pub mod declarations (engine/init/ops/registry/fetch/ingest) — cli imports registry/fetch/ingest directly, so the change is additive/non-breaking.
Expand terse one-liner /// docs on ops public fns into what/params/return form; verify/polish init::provision_project docs.
Do not leak internal helpers (Loaded, CapturedQuery, Index, Sources, Spec, Catalog) — already private.
Build standalone smoke crate under the task dir: grove-core path dep + empty [workspace] table to detach from parent workspace.
REVISION 1 (grammar resolution): smoke main.rs sets GROVE_REGISTRY to repo registry/ before ops::symbols; dev_root() = <crate>/registry is non-existent so not a fallback — makes AC3 reproducible.
REVISION 2 (sample language): sample tree uses Rust .rs files; repo registry/ ships a verified rust grammar (grammar.wasm + tags.scm).
provision_project(dry_run=true) needs no grammar and returns Ok(Vec::new()) — evidence is its printed narration, not a non-empty vec.
Commit the smoke crate's Cargo.lock as durable AC4 no-clap provenance (cargo tree + lockfile).
Testing: workspace cargo test --release --locked + clippy -D warnings green; cargo doc -p grove-core --no-deps; smoke cargo run captured in PROGRESS.
Operational impact: material (additive public-API change), semver-additive; version/publish decision owned by T06; smoke crate never published.
